response.step_by_step_log: 1. Watched the entire video to assess audio and visual content. 2. Identified the VTubers as members of Hololive's holoX unit. 3. Monitored for any vocal performances. 4. Confirmed the audio consists only of dialogue, crowd noise, and instrumental background music. 5. Concluded no vocal songs are present in this segment.
response.global_summary: The video features a brief, live-streamed segment of four VTubers (Sakamata Chloe, La+ Darknesss, Hakui Koyori, and Kazama Iroha) from the Hololive group holoX, introducing a performance, followed by the end of the free broadcast segment and an instrumental track. No vocal songs are performed.

scenes.description: The four VTubers are speaking and engaging with the audience on a concert stage. There is no vocal singing.
The video switches to a static announcement screen stating that the free part of the show has ended, accompanied by background instrumental music.
